---
title: "__init__.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\__init__.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.95
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 4.31
---

## Intent
The `__init__.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on _apply_pydantic_v1_patch, patched_set_default. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via _apply_pydantic_v1_patch, patched_set_default. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [warnings](file://warnings)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `_apply_pydantic_v1_patch`
- `patched_set_default`
